calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Continued To Aug-12-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on Petition to Approve a Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth Bailey, Esq. appeared with petitioner Su Qing Situ, who was present as Guardian ad litem for Philip Guo Li Hu, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Raymond Fong was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $164,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $41,000.00.
Medical Expenses - $12,868.43.

A net balance of $110,131.57 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America located at 1525 Market Street, San Francisco, CA 94103. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromise of Claim, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
